alkylation reagent: 12 μl of 55 mM iodoacetic acid was added for alkylation
alkylation concentration: 12 μl of 55 mM iodoacetic acid was added for alkylation
cleavage agent: 20 μl of trypsin/LysC mix solution [trypsin (50 ng/μl) from Promega and LysC (50 ng/μl) from WAKO]
fragmentation method: followed by MS2 fragmentation of the 20 most intense peptides
instrument: new-generation hybrid linear ion trap-orbitrap mass spectrometer (LTQ Orbitrap Elite, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
ionization type: connected to a new-generation hybrid linear ion trap-orbitrap mass spectrometer (LTQ Orbitrap Elite, Thermo Fisher Scientific) equipped with an EASY-Spray electrospray source
labeling: TMS represents an advanced native ECM–based 3D culture model that can be tailored for systemic biomedical research ranging from molecular mechanistic studies to animal models.
